untranslatable_reason: Signal requires dynamic cross-sectional stock selection, intelligent reweighting criteria, and cointegration-based portfolio formation—none of which can be expressed as simple single-instrument indicator conditions. The original source text references a fixed instrument set with mean reversion via cointegration, but the signal description emphasizes dynamic daily selection and reweighting across a universe of stocks. This requires multi-asset ranking/selection logic, cointegration analysis, and portfolio optimization that are beyond single-instrument technical indicator rules.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using daily returns as a mean reversion proxy (long when returns are negative, short when positive, exit on reversal). However, this is a significant simplification that misses the core mechanism: cross-sectional selection of multiple instruments with intelligent reweighting. The signal also references undefined parameters (lookback_period, threshold, half_life) marked AUTHOR_SILENT. A proper implementation would require a custom backtest module supporting multi-asset cointegration analysis and dynamic portfolio rebalancing.
